title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・もっと、もっと

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky wins the autumn Tenno Sho. She
receives praise from her friends and promises
Special Week they'll compete again at the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, after the race, Seiun Sky discovers she's
injured one of her legs. Fortunately, it's not
serious, but her doctor recommends she rest for
the remainder of the year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a rare sight, Seiun Sky emotionally pleads that
I let her run in the Arima Kinen. After all the hard
work she's done to break past her personal wall,
she can't hide how she truly feels about winning.
